tactical_shape: Introduced Francisco Conceição to add penetration down the right
standout_players: João Neves scored with a sixth-minute header
Pedro Neto provided the cross for the opener
Nuno Mendes had a bursting run that was stopped by Aaron Wan-Bissaka
Francisco Conceição brought more penetration after coming on
Cristiano Ronaldo had two half-chances and later two headers/crosses wide, but was largely peripheral
Bernardo Silva was described as disappointing
home_read.momentum: A frustrating draw that exposed Portugal's lack of pace and dependence on Ronaldo, leaving questions over whether they can turn control into goals.

tactical_shape: Dug in after falling behind and stayed competitive
Used a short corner routine for the equaliser
Played with Premier League nous and an experienced, compact approach
standout_players: Yoane Wissa scored the equaliser with a well-taken header and was praised for an exceptional shift
Cédric Bakambu was tireless and twice threatened to deepen Portuguese discomfort
Samuel Moutoussamy was tireless in midfield
Arthur Masuaku delivered the inswinging corner for the goal
Aaron Wan-Bissaka made a last-ditch intervention on Nuno Mendes
away_read.momentum: A positive, historic result: Congo DR earned their first World Cup point and looked tough, organised and capable against a favoured opponent.
